verdict_rationale: Daniel Miessler's PAI is a near-kill: n=1, ~2-year longitudinal personal deployment with published behavioral reflection, 3,540 signals, 84 failure-event analysis, versioned algorithm, conference talk at [un]prompted 2026. This is a practitioner parallel, not academic study. Claim survives if it requires (a) named framework (Mem0/Letta/etc.), (b) prospective study design with defined outcomes, or (c) peer-reviewed publication. The deployment practice itself is not novel — the academic framing may be.

sources.title: Daniel Miessler — Building Your Own Personal AI Infrastructure
sources.similarity: HIGHEST — n=1, longitudinal ~2yr, custom 3-tier memory, 3540 signals, failure analysis, behavioral steering rules, conference talk
sources.difference: Custom architecture not named framework; blog not academic paper; eventually expanded to multi-person

sources.title: The Algorithmic Self-Portrait: Deconstructing Memory in ChatGPT
sources.similarity: HIGH — real-world ChatGPT memory data from 80 users; analysis of what system learned about them; GDPR data donations
sources.difference: n=80 not n=1; retrospective analysis; not self-deployment study

sources.title: Letta Discord support agent (months of learning)
sources.similarity: MEDIUM — explicitly longitudinal (~1 month learning), real deployment
sources.difference: Vendor-run bot not personal self-study; no user-side behavioral analysis published

sources.title: CloneMem: Benchmarking Long-Term Memory for AI Clones
sources.similarity: MEDIUM — 1-3 year personal digital traces (diaries, email, social media) used for longitudinal coherence
sources.difference: Synthetic/reconstructed data not live deployment; benchmark not study

sources.title: Cognitive Revolution podcast — Miessler PAI deep-dive
sources.similarity: MEDIUM — corroborates Miessler longitudinal n=1 deployment; widely distributed
sources.difference: Podcast not academic study; no data tables

sources.title: Mem0: Building Production-Ready AI Agents with Scalable Long-Term Memory
sources.similarity: MEDIUM — production deployment with longitudinal personalization; real user data
sources.difference: Vendor-authored; no individual n=1 user study; no user behavioral analysis

sources.title: MultiSessionCollab: Learning User Preferences with Memory
sources.similarity: MEDIUM — 19-participant user study, 3 sessions, memory improves personalization
sources.difference: n=19 not n=1; only 3 sessions not longitudinal; researcher-designed tasks

sources.title: ByteRover: Agent-Native Memory Through LLM-Curated Hierarchical Context
sources.similarity: LOW-MEDIUM — production memory system; LoCoMo 92.2%; developer-focused
sources.difference: System paper not user study; no n=1 personal deployment described

sources.title: mnemos-os/mnemos — Production-grade memory OS in use since Dec 2025
sources.similarity: LOW — production use since Dec 2025; longitudinal implied
sources.difference: No published behavioral data; no individual n=1 study; enterprise-oriented

sources.title: HN: An experiment in separating identity, memory, and tools
sources.similarity: LOW-MEDIUM — title suggests personal experimentation with agent memory architecture
sources.difference: Content inaccessible (rate-limited); duration and scope unknown

key_gaps: Discord/Slack community archives not indexed — Letta/Mem0 Discord likely contains solo dev longitudinal threads
Enterprise memory deployments (Copilot, Salesforce) are n=1 per user but entirely unpublished
HN item 46398323 inaccessible — potential high-similarity hit
Miessler's PAI is the dominant practitioner parallel; claim's survival depends on academic framing requirement
